title: Battle of New Alderaan (disambiguation)
content:
There were two '''battles of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]''' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]:
*The [[Battle of New Alderaan (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of New Alderaan]] during the [[Hunt for Zsinj]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]
*The [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|Battle of New Alderaan]] during [[Operation Shadow Hand]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]

{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Battles of New Alderaan| ]]
